name: Jiawei Renewable Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiawei Renewable Energy Co., Ltd. focuses on the research and development, production, and sale of lithium-ion batteries and systems. The company is also involved in the investment, construction, and operation of photovoltaic power stations. In addition, it provides solar landscape, low voltage landscape, and portable solar lights; retrofit, puff, and track lights; and smart security and camera floodlights. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Jiawei Photovoltaic Lighting Co., Ltd. Jiawei Renewable Energy Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
